subcodes.first_line: O my God! How can I loose the reins of my praise and attributes in an arena wherein even the horsemen of the Kingdom stand powerless? How can I soar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انی لی یا الهی اطلق عنان محامدی و نعوتی فی مضمار اعجز فوارس الملکوت و کیف اطیر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @humility; meekness; lowliness
